title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono argues that competing with AI on raw knowledge is a losing race for humans, and that true intelligence in the age of AI should be defined by curiosity and human judgment rather than knowledge accumulation. He draws on the legacy of mathematician Srinivasa Ramanujan to illustrate how non-traditional thinkers can reshape entire fields.
